历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 10364 → 15233 → 14582 → 22654 → 23125. In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao, the ranking dropped significantly by about 8000 places, and in 2025 it remained roughly stable (dropping by about 471 places), stabilizing in the 22,000–23,000 range over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 23125. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou was 70 in 2021, 76 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 87 in 2024, and 91 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 87 students, a decrease of 4 from 2025, a slight reduction, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 74th, with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 78th in 2021 to 74th in 2026), indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat positive, with the men's volleyball team winning the championship boosting the university's sports reputation. It ranks 43rd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure. In 2023, there were discussions comparing its admission cutoff to that of 985 universities, but no significant gaps were recorded. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top nationally), and Materials Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class discipline. Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have extremely high admission rankings (5000–7000), strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity, while Clinical Medicine continues to be recommended, aligning with the university's strengths in engineering and medicine. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,000 in 2025, with an estimated 208,000 Physics Category candidates, intensifying competition slightly. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, with an enrollment share in Guizhou of about 1.5% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Both Jiangxi and Guizhou are in the central-western region, with no significant regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 23125, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-4 students) causing a forward shift in ranking, a slight increase in candidate numbers, and positive reputation, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to shift slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22400, with a range of 21900–22900.
